inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar hai, sar dard hai, thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever, malaise, headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also present with similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Typhoid is less likely at this stage, but cannot be ruled out

inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai, kabz hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are characteristic of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause abdominal pain and constipation

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the progression of symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, bohot kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis is less likely given the combination of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely given the absence of typical symptoms like chills and rigors

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar abhi bhi hai, pet dard badh gaya hai
inputs.image_desc: patient on cot, unable to move

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged fever, exhaustion, and abdominal pain are consistent with typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out given the progression of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out given the absence of typical symptoms
